heading: Certain Alabama lands subject to homestead entry
label: 172 Certain Alabama lands subject to homestead entry
text: All lands designated as agricultural in the reclassification of the public lands of Alabama by the Secretary of the Interior under authority of Act (chapter 1347, section 1, Thirty-fourth Statutes, page 88), shall be subject to homestead entry as such.March 27, 1906
notes: References in TextAct (chapter 1347, section 1, Thirty-fourth Statutes, page 88), referred to in text, is not classified to the Code.March 27, 1906
